title: echium modestum var. decipiens
intro: Echium modestum var. decipiens, also known as Rock Borage or Rock Viper's Bugloss, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Echium modestum var. decipiens include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
